title: cyclandrophora scabra
intro: Cyclandrophora scabra, also known as Cyclandrophora scabra, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly referred to as the carrot or parsley family. The medicinal properties of Cyclandrophora scabra include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Cyclandrophora scabra is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
